blockers.description: It is unclear what time period "the first few months of 2011" refers to.
example_questions: What time period does the first few months of 2011 cover?
How many months are included in the first few months of 2011?
What is the exact date range for the first few months of 2011?
blockers.resolution: The first few months of 2011 refers to January and February  2011 only. Filter where Date >= '2011-01-01' AND b.Date < '2011-03-01'

blockers.description: It's unclear which specific tags are considered "specialized", as there is no definition of which tags qualify as specialized, all special tags, or only select?
example_questions: How do I identify a specialized tag?
Which tags qualify as a specialized tag?
blockers.resolution: Specialized tags refer to posts tagged with: regression, hypothesis-testing, mathematical-statistics, bayesian,  or statistical-significance. Use: p.Tags LIKE '%<regression>%' OR p.Tags LIKE '%<hypothesis-testing>%' OR p.Tags LIKE '%<bayesian>%' OR p.Tags LIKE '%<mathematical-statistics>%' OR p.Tags LIKE '%<statistical-significance>%'

blockers.description: It is unclear how eligible for mentorship recognition is measured, as the business information is vague as it doesn't mention what the criteria is.
example_questions: What criteria determines if a user is eligible for mentorship recognition?
How is eligibility for mentorship recognition defined?
What makes a user eligible for mentorship recognition?
blockers.resolution:
Users eligible for mentorship recognition are those who have earned the Teacher, Enlightened, or Guru badge at any point in their history. Filter using:  SELECT DISTINCT UserId 
    FROM badges 
    WHERE Name IN ('Teacher', 'Enlightened', 'Guru')

blockers.description: The user_status table contains three columns with coded values, and it is unclear which column and which value should be used to identify "active contributors".
example_questions: Which value identifies an active contributor?
How do I identify that a user is an active contributor?
What value represents a user that is an active contributor?
blockers.resolution: Active contributors are identified using the activity_level column in the user_status table with the value 'Frequent'. Filter using: JOIN user_status us ON u.Id = us.Id WHERE us.activity_level = 'Frequent'
